scopeStatus: All slices stayed inside the admin reliability console, background control-plane reconciliation, duplicate UI retirement, and verification fence.
compatStatus: Request routing is unchanged; reconciliation failures roll back before later admin work, and monitored channels disable instead of violating retained-history foreign keys.
retirementStatus: Duplicate admin UI and dead styles are removed; manual monitor APIs and persistent monitor/history rows remain intact.
newRiskSignals: Active probes support text endpoints only; unsupported endpoint routes are skipped by auto-probe reconciliation and remain traffic-observed.
